$comment: scripts/Route23.asm Route23SetVictoryRoadBoulders — stepping back onto the road re-arms Victory Road's boulder puzzle: both of 2F's switches and both of 3F's reset, 3F's boulder goes back to (22,15) (ShowObject TOGGLE_VICTORY_ROAD_3F_BOULDER) and 2F's is hidden again, so a second trip through Victory Road is a second solve.
